rule_metadata.author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
rule_metadata.title: Command Shell Bypassing Security Controls (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)

rules.rule_text:
title: Command Shell Bypassing Security Controls (RedCanary Threat Detection Report)
id: e76af6c9-1c66-4ed7-9a36-b2f905e2e78c
status: experimental
description: Detects command line strings which indicate potential attempts to bypass
  controls. Part of the RedCanary 2023 Threat Detection Report.
references:
- https://redcanary.com/threat-detection-report/techniques/windows-command-shell/
author: RedCanary, Sigma formatting by Micah Babinski
date: 2023/05/10
tags:
- attack.execution
- attack.t1059.003
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection:
    Image|endswith: \cmd.exe
    CommandLine|contains:
    - bypass
    - -exec
  condition: selection
falsepositives:
- Unknown
level: low
